title: 有馬記念の後に・憧れの先へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki takes first place in the Arima Kinen,
and the stands ring with resonant cheers and
applause!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's overcome with emotion but has managed to
show her audience a beautiful dream. She bows
respectfully to them and promises that her
miracle will go on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has fulfilled her goal of becoming the
greatest entertainer ever. She's found real
confidence and the path she's meant to take.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtains close on Fuji Kiseki's show, but the
end is merely another beginning. The start of her
next show will come sooner than we know...
